title: Trump’s Actions in Iran and Venezuela Show Limits of U.S. Sanctions
summary_full: America’s vast economic powers are able to wear down an adversary’s economy but are insufficient to topple leaders on their own.
summary_public: America’s vast economic powers are able to wear down an adversary’s economy but are insufficient to topple leaders on their own.
